_meta.schema: keyed by upstream 88onsen id. entry = {name, kana?, romaji?, note}. `name` = the snapshot facility_name the correction was verified against — kana_for()/romaji_for() ignore the entry (with a warning) if the live name drifts, so a reused hid can never inherit a stale reading. `kana` overrides the published nameKana (pure hiragana; the resolver re-folds defensively). `romaji` overrides nameRomaji. `note` = evidence/source so future reviews can re-verify.
_meta.policy: Correct only what a source verifies: official facility sites, city/prefecture tourism pages, Wikipedia, or a reading printed in the name itself — never a guess. Romaji style: Japanese words keep the pipeline's macron-free modified Hepburn (long vowels doubled: Kujuu Hosshou), so corrected and generated names stay consistent; katakana loanwords restore the original Latin word (Samson Hotel, Seaside, Center, Sun Lupinus); particles are lowercase (no).
_meta.curatedBy: 2026-07 full-catalog reading review (161 onsens): session-model review of every generated reading + per-item web verification.
